description_long: This stone block is rectangular with slightly irregular edges and a weathered, chalky surface. The block is predominantly light gray with patches of white and some darker smudges, suggesting exposure to the elements or construction materials. Faint, hand-drawn markings resembling windows, doors, and geometric shapes are visible on the top and sides, giving it a utilitarian or repurposed appearance. The corners and edges show signs of chipping and abrasion, indicating age or frequent handling. The surface texture appears rough and matte, with some areas more worn than others. Overall, the block looks solid and heavy, suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular, weathered stone block with light gray and white tones, rough texture, and faint hand-drawn markings on its surfaces.
description_view_0: The short end of the block is visible, showing a mostly flat face with some chipping and faint markings.
description_view_1: The long side is shown, featuring more pronounced hand-drawn markings and a visible patch of rough, chipped texture.
description_view_2: The opposite short end is visible, with two circular marks and additional faint lines, plus some surface wear.
description_view_3: The other long side is shown, with less prominent markings and a smoother, lighter surface compared to view 1.
attribute_installation_method: dry-stacked or placed directly on the ground
attribute_weathering_pattern: Surface shows signs of abrasion, chipping, and discoloration, indicating exposure to weather and handling.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Faint hand-drawn markings resembling windows, doors, and geometric shapes are visible.
